mapper.select: SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id ORDER BY c.calendar_id DESC

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.applicant_id = #{applicantId}
SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE e.dept = #{dept}

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date AND c.applicant_id = #{applicantId}

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date AND e.dept = #{dept}

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date

SELECT c.calendar_id, c.start_date, c.end_date, c.title, c.content, c.applicant_id, e.emp_id, e.name, e.dept FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN employee e ON c.applicant_id = e.emp_id WHERE c.calendar_id = #{calendarId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO calendar(start_date, end_date, title, content, applicant_id) VALUES (#{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{title}, #{content}, #{applicantId})
